sourceMovie.title: Your Name Engraved Herein
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Your Name Engraved Herein (2020) as a romance theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The romance and drama blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: After
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Your Name Engraved Herein clicked for you, After (2019) is a strong next stop: both trade in romance and drama, with emotional whiplash that feels honest. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Love, Simon
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Your Name Engraved Herein clicked for you, Love, Simon (2018) is a strong next stop: both trade in romance and drama, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Your Name Engraved Herein?
faq.answer: Try After, Love, Simon, Flipped—each shares DNA with Your Name Engraved Herein while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Your Name Engraved Herein?
faq.answer: Your Name Engraved Herein (2020) is best described as Romance, Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Your Name Engraved Herein worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.9/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this romance lane.
